notes: Status model intentionally unavailable. The dashboard shows the observed PM&C National Fuel Security Plan level, but does not translate it into Stable/Tight/Disrupted/Critical until outage, import, stock and product-day coverage rules are defensible.
citation: Fuel Resilience AU, Fuel security methodology.

fields.reason: Input coverage is not yet sufficient for a defensible Stable/Tight/Disrupted/Critical dashboard model.
blockers: No public national live station outage feed is loaded.
No source-safe live vessel or ETA-level shipment feed is loaded.
No terminal-by-terminal public storage capacity or live inventory feed is loaded.
PM&C/DCCEEW public fuel-supply snapshot remains manual because local pipeline requests return an Incapsula challenge and no stable CSV/JSON/XLSX endpoint is exposed.
No documented, tested thresholds exist for mapping public snapshot fields into Stable/Tight/Disrupted/Critical labels.
required_inputs: Latest reviewed PM&C/DCCEEW national fuel-supply snapshot.
Product-level petrol, diesel and jet days/reserve context.
Outage coverage with visible geographic limits.
Import/shipping aggregate context with no vessel-level claims.
Storage/terminal inclusion or explicit exclusion rule.
Freshness/stale rule for every contributing source.
fields.minimum_geographic_coverage: No Stable/Tight/Disrupted/Critical label until the model either has national outage coverage or visibly treats WA/QLD partial layers as incomplete inputs.
fields.minimum_freshness: Every contributing source must carry a reviewed/retrieved date and source-specific stale threshold before the model can publish a label.
fields.test_requirement: Threshold rules must be implemented in code and covered by unit tests before a public national status label is displayed.
